title: • User requests short description + Copilot prompt.
content:
• User requests short description + Copilot prompt.

9. 10response – Repo-Audit-and-Triage-Tool Specification
• 350-char description and 500-char Copilot prompt.
• Full technical design: Python, GitHub API, classification logic, outputs.
• File structure and dependency list.
• Sample output markdown.
• Establishes environment variables and rules.

⸻

VI. Repository Hierarchy Correction Layer

10. 11prompt – Clarify sequence (thought Cognitive Archaeology next)
• User queries sequence confusion.

11. 11response – Corrects hierarchy
• Confirms cognitive-archaeology-suite precedes all.
• Provides full repo spec (description, Copilot prompt, file structure, sample outputs).
• Adds environment variables, dependencies, execution commands.
• Confirms this repo is the “correct foundation.”

⸻

VII. Implementation Verification Layer
